seo.title: Building Agentic RAG with Claude Tool Use + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build agentic rag with Claude Tool Use + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building Agentic RAG with Claude Tool Use enables autonomous multi-step retrieval and synthesis, leveraging Claude's native tool calling for dynamic query planning across multiple sources. Guardrails are essential to prevent cascading tool failures, hallucinated citations, and inconsistent reasoning that undermine reliability in high-stakes applications. Vex integration ensures source faithfulness and cross-verification, transforming fragile agents into production-ready systems.

architectureOverview.heading: Agentic RAG Architecture with Claude Tool Use
architectureOverview.description:
The architecture begins with Claude receiving a user query and autonomously planning retrieval strategies via tool calls to vector stores, web search, and knowledge bases. Parallel tool execution fetches chunks from multiple sources, followed by Claude's synthesis phase where it ranks relevance, resolves conflicts, and generates attributed responses. This loop iterates until convergence, with tools for query refinement and citation tracking.

Claude's agentic loop handles orchestration: planning → execution → reflection → synthesis. Tools include retrievers (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate), citation generators, and consistency checkers. Vex wraps critical synthesis steps to verify outputs against retrieved sources.

Key components: Tool definitions for retrieval APIs, message streaming for iterative tool use, and final output formatting with inline citations.
architectureOverview.diagram:
User Query
    ↓
Claude Planner ─┬→ Tool: Vector Search (Pinecone)
                ├→ Tool: Web Search
                └→ Tool: Knowledge Base
    ↓ (Parallel Results)
Claude Synthesizer ─→ Vex Verify (Faithfulness/Consistency)
    ↓
Attributed Response w/ Citations

risks.name: Cascading Tool Failures
risks.description: Early retrieval tool errors propagate through synthesis, producing empty or garbage outputs
risks.mitigation: Wrap tool_use messages with vex.verify() to catch and retry failures

risks.name: Hallucinated Citations
risks.description: Agent fabricates source references not present in retrieved chunks
risks.mitigation: Source faithfulness checks via Vex semantic matching against actual chunks

risks.name: Cross-Source Inconsistency
risks.description: Parallel retrievals yield conflicting facts without resolution
risks.mitigation: Consistency scoring across all retrieved sources before synthesis

risks.name: Query Planning Drift
risks.description: Autonomous query refinement deviates from original intent
risks.mitigation: Verify planned queries maintain semantic alignment with user intent

implementation.title: Define Retrieval Tools for Claude
implementation.description: Create tool definitions for vector search and web retrieval that Claude can call autonomously

implementation.title: Agentic Loop with Parallel Tool Calls
implementation.description: Stream messages and execute tools in Claude's native agentic pattern
implementation.code:
async def agentic_rag(client: anthropic.Anthropic, query: str):
    messages = [{"role": "user", "content": query}]
    
    with client.messages.stream(
        model="claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620",
        max_tokens=1024,
        tools=retrieval_tools,
        messages=messages
    ) as stream:
        for text in stream.text_stream():
            print(text, end='')
        
        # Execute parallel tools
        for event in stream.events():
            if event.type == 'tool_use':
                # Execute tools and feed back results
                pass

vexIntegration.title: Verify Tool Use Synthesis
vexIntegration.description: Wrap Claude's tool_use response with Vex for source faithfulness
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import verify

import anthropic
client = anthropic.Anthropic()

# After tool execution
message = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620",
    max_tokens=1024,
    tools=retrieval_tools,
    messages=messages
)

# Vex verification
verified = verify(
    message.content[0].text,
    context=retrieved_chunks,  # All tool results
    checks=[
        'source_faithfulness',
        'no_hallucinations',
        'cross_source_consistency'
    ],
    risk_profile='high'
)

if verified:
    return message
else:
    # Retry or flag
    pass

vexIntegration.title: Query Planning Verification
vexIntegration.description: Ensure autonomous query refinement stays on track
vexIntegration.code:
verified_plan = verify(
    planned_query,  # Claude's generated search query
    context=original_user_query,
    checks=['semantic_similarity'],
    threshold=0.85,  # Min similarity to original intent
    risk_profile='high'
)

if not verified_plan:
    # Fallback to original query
    planned_query = original_user_query
